message:
feat(storage): tick 138 pane-bookmark cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Seventeenth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 5 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the pane-bookmark cluster.

New siblings:
- insert_pane_bookmark_with_cx (write path)
- delete_pane_bookmark_with_cx (write path)
- get_pane_bookmark_by_alias_with_cx (read path)
- list_pane_bookmarks_with_cx (read path)
- list_pane_bookmarks_by_tag_with_cx (read path)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick138_pane_bookmark_cluster_roundtrip` — two
bookmarks inserted so the tag filter can prove selectivity
(primary tag yields one row, shared tick138 tag yields both).
Full flow insert → get_by_alias → list_all → list_by_tag → delete.
Verified via fork bypass: 485/485 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 76 + 5 = 81 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 59 legacy methods still lack a sibling; pane-bookmark
cluster now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
